---
title: "06_ewas"
author: "Jagadeesh Puvvula"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
analy_df <- read_csv("~/Documents/k99_home/data/analytic_data_for_analysis.csv") |>
  select(-c(visit))  |>
  select(-c(2:27))|>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor),
         parity_n = as.factor(parity_n)) |>
  rename(
    # BASC
    "BASC-BSI"       = basc_bsi,
    "BASC-EXT"       = basc_ext,
    "BASC-INZ"       = basc_inz,
    # Covariates
    "Sex"            = sex,
    "Race"           = race,
    "Marital-Status" = mari_st,
    "Mom-Education"  = mom_edu,
    "HOME-Score"     = home_score_total,
    "Mom-Age"        = mom_age_deliv,
    "Gest-Age"       = gest_age,
    # OPEs
    #"BCEP"           = BCEtP,
    #"DNBP"           = DBuP,
    #"DPHP"           = DPhP,
    #"BDCIPP"         = BDCPP
  ) |>
  mutate(across(15:64, log2)) |>
  clean_names() 
```

#load preprocessed methylation and cell proportion data
```{r}
load("~/Documents/k99_home/new/beta.rda")

pheno_data<- read_csv("~/Documents/k99_home/pheno_data.csv") |> 
  rename(subject_id = participant_id) |>
  filter(subject_id %in% analy_df$subject_id)

beta_filtered <- beta[, colnames(beta) %in% pheno_data$basename]
  
cell_proportions_idol <- read_csv("~/Documents/k99_home/dnam_prep_data/cell_proportions_idol.csv") |> 
  rename(subject_id = participant_id) |>
  filter(subject_id %in% pheno_data$subject_id)

rm(beta);gc()
```

#drop participants with missing epigenetic data
```{r}
analy_df_ewas <- analy_df |> filter(subject_id %in% pheno_data$subject_id) |>
  left_join(pheno_data |> select(subject_id, basename), by = "subject_id") |>
  left_join(cell_proportions_idol, by = "subject_id") |>
  clean_names() |>
  select(-c(basename_x, batch)) |>
  rename(basename = basename_y)
```

#run ewas
```{r}
ewas_loop_pll(
  exposures = c(
    "pbde100_avg","pbde153_avg","pbde47_avg","pbde99_avg","pbde28_avg",
    
    "mbp_16w","mbzp_16w","mcpp_16w","mecpp_16w","mehhp_16w",
    "mehp_16w","meohp_16w","mep_16w","mibp_16w",

    "mbp_26w","mbzp_26w","mcpp_26w","mecpp_26w","mehhp_26w",
    "mehp_26w","meohp_26w","mep_26w","mibp_26w",

    "mbp_avg","mbzp_avg","mcpp_avg","mecpp_avg","mehhp_avg",
    "mehp_avg","meohp_avg","mep_avg","mibp_avg",
    
    "d_bu_p_16w","bdcpp_16w","d_ph_p_16w","bc_et_p_16w",
    "bdcpp_26w","d_bu_p_26w","d_ph_p_26w","bc_et_p_26w",
    "bc_et_p_avg","bdcpp_avg","d_bu_p_avg","d_ph_p_avg"
    ),
  covariates = c("race", "income_group", "home_score",
                 "cd8t", "cd4t", "nk", "bcell", "mono", "gran", "n_rbc"),
  bVals_list  = list(beta_filtered),
  bVals_names = c("beta_filtered"),
  dat_pheno   = analy_df_ewas,
  outputFolder = "~/Documents/k99_home/results/ewas_results",
  fdr_thresholds  = c(0.20, 0.10, 0.05),
  pval_thresholds = c(7.01e-08)
  )
```

#extract significant results
```{r}
path <- "~/Documents/k99_home/results/ewas_results/"

files <- list.files(path, pattern = "\\.rds$|\\.rda$", full.names = TRUE)

df_final <- map_dfr(files, function(f) {
    
    # ---- Load file ----
    if (str_detect(f, "\\.rds$")) {
        x <- readRDS(f)
    } else {
        env <- new.env()
        load(f, envir = env)
        x <- env[[ls(env)[1]]]
    }
    
    # ---- Threshold ----
    threshold <- if (str_detect(f, "Male|Female")) 0.05 else 0.05
    
    # ---- Filename info ----
    fname <- basename(f)
    exposure <- str_extract(fname, "(?<=ewas_).*?(?=_beta)")
    sex <- str_extract(fname, "Male|Female")
    
    # ---- Tables ----
    y <- x$results
    
    # coefficients table (adjust name if needed)
    z <- x$coefficients |>
        rownames_to_column("CPG.Labels")
    
    # ---- Merge + filter ----
    res <- y |>
        filter(FDR < threshold) |>
        left_join(z, by = "CPG.Labels") |>
        mutate(
            exposure = exposure,
            sex = sex,
            file = fname
        )
    
    return(res)
})

#export significant results
write_csv(df_final, "~/Documents/k99_home/results/ewas_significant_cpgs.csv")
```

#explore and visualize results
```{r}
ewas_lambda <- read_csv("~/Documents/k99_home/results/ewas_results/ewas_summary.csv") |>
  select(c(1,3:5)) |>
  mutate(stratum = recode(stratum,
                          "sex=Female" = "Female",
                          "sex=Male"   = "Male",
                          "Overall"    = "All"),
         exposure_window = word(exposure, -1, sep = "_"),
    exposure = str_remove(exposure, paste0("_", exposure_window, "$")),
    exposure = recode(exposure,
      bc_et_p = "BCEP", bdcpp   = "BDCIPP", d_bu_p  = "DNBP", d_ph_p  = "DPHP",
      mbp     = "MBP", mbzp    = "MBZP", mcpp    = "MCPP", mecpp   = "MECPP",
      mehhp   = "MEHHP", mehp    = "MEHP", meohp   = "MEOHP", mibp    = "MiBP",
      pbde47  = "PBDE47"
    )) |>
  rename(sex = stratum)

cpg_viz <- read_csv("~/Documents/k99_home/results/ewas_significant_cpgs.csv") |>
  clean_names() |>
  mutate(
    sex = coalesce(sex, "All"),
    exposure_window = word(exposure, -1, sep = "_"),
    exposure = str_remove(exposure, paste0("_", exposure_window, "$")),
    exposure = recode(exposure,
      bc_et_p = "BCEP", bdcpp   = "BDCIPP", d_bu_p  = "DNBP", d_ph_p  = "DPHP",
      mbp     = "MBP", mbzp    = "MBZP", mcpp    = "MCPP", mecpp   = "MECPP",
      mehhp   = "MEHHP", mehp    = "MEHP", meohp   = "MEOHP", mibp    = "MiBP",
      pbde47  = "PBDE47"
    )) |>
  select(c(1, 5, 10:13, 15))
```

#overall counts
```{r}
# Prep lambda table (match formatting exactly)
lambda_tbl <- ewas_lambda %>%
  mutate(
    window = case_when(
      exposure_window == "16w" ~ "16W",
      exposure_window == "26w" ~ "26W",
      str_detect(exposure_window, "avg") ~ "Average",
      TRUE ~ exposure_window
    ),
    sex = case_when(
      sex %in% c("All", "Overall") ~ "Overall",
      sex %in% c("sex=Female", "Female") ~ "Female",
      sex %in% c("sex=Male", "Male") ~ "Male",
      TRUE ~ sex
    )
  ) %>%
  select(exposure, window, sex, n, lambda)

# Main table
cpg_counts <- cpg_viz %>%
  mutate(
    window = case_when(
      exposure_window == "16w" ~ "16W",
      exposure_window == "26w" ~ "26W",
      str_detect(exposure_window, "avg") ~ "Average",
      TRUE ~ exposure_window
    ),
    sex = case_when(
      sex == "All" ~ "Overall",
      TRUE ~ sex
    )
  ) %>%
  distinct(cpg_labels, exposure, window, sex) %>%
  count(exposure, window, sex, name = "unique_cpgs") %>%
  
  # Join in n + lambda
  left_join(lambda_tbl, by = c("exposure", "window", "sex")) %>%
  
  # Format output
  mutate(
    formatted = if_else(
      is.na(n) | is.na(lambda),
      as.character(unique_cpgs),
      paste0(
        unique_cpgs,
        " (n=", n,
        " | \u03BB=", sprintf("%.3f", lambda), ")"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  
  select(exposure, window, sex, formatted) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sex, values_from = formatted) %>%
  arrange(exposure, window) %>%
  select(exposure, window, Overall, Male, Female)
```

#summary of overlapping cpgs
```{r}
cpg_summary <- cpg_viz |>
    mutate(combo = str_c(exposure, exposure_window, sex, sep = "_")) |>
    group_by(cpg_labels) |>
    summarise(
        repeat_times = n(),
        combinations = str_c(sort(unique(combo)), collapse = "; ")
    ) |>
    ungroup() |>
  filter(repeat_times > 1)
```
